change: The optional total_length_lower_bound parameter and CLI flag were added while the sequential matrix was running.
command_effect: No matrix command supplied --total-length-lower-bound, so the parameter had its default None value and added no constraint.
comparison_method: Using the post-change build_circle_interval_problem with m=3.0 and total_length_lower_bound left at its default, rebuild each representative configuration; remove metadata; serialize the remaining name, variables, objective, and constraints as sorted compact JSON; compare it with the corresponding saved problem core and compute SHA-256.
conclusion: The transition was metadata-only for this matrix; the saved optimization models are equivalent to the current default-None models.
